goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'north american' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '11:45' on 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in 'the type of hotel'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve north american food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 11:45 on monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of hotel
Make sure you get whether they have internet and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
